TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: KA ni-matti-v'lli ta ti Jefus mattæ'i-la neini-æn ki pæ myhkaulaula'n, ka k'ma,
KA ni-matti-v'lli ta ti Jefus mattæ'i-la neini-æn ki pæ myhkaulaula'n, ka k'ma,
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus antwoordende sprack tot haer wederom door ghelijckenissen seggende | :
And Jesus answered and spake unto them again by parables, and said,
耶穌又用比喻對他們說：

S.FORM: Mæmyhkaulaula ta Peifa-fou-an ki tounnoun ki vullum ki voual ka Si-bavau Mei-fafou,ka ni-papahtatanang ki Alak tyn [ka parah ki vatouh-an ki pakakyt-tyl-an.
Mæmyhkaulaula ta Peifa-fou-an ki tounnoun ki vullum ki voual ka Si-bavau Mei-fafou,ka ni-papahtatanang ki Alak tyn [ka parah ki vatouh-an ki pakakyt-tyl-an.
S.TRANS: Het honinckriick Der Hemelen is geliick cen seker Koningh die rhnen sone een bruploft bereydt hadde,
The kingdom of heaven is like unto a certain king, which made a marriage for his son,
「天國好比一個王為他兒子擺設娶親的筵席，

S.FORM: Ka ni-madingi ki kouncia tyn patætæäm ki ni 'æitannin ba na tou ou-vavatoug-eih ki paka-kyttil-an, rå ni-ynnang mou-koua.
Ka ni-madingi ki kouncia tyn patætæäm ki ni 'æitannin ba na tou ou-vavatoug-eih ki paka-kyttil-an, rå ni-ynnang mou-koua.
S.TRANS: Ende fond zijne dienstknechten uyt om de genoodde ter bruploft te roepen ende spen wilden niet kgmen.
And sent forth his servants to call them that were bidden to the wedding: and they would not come.
就打發僕人去，請那些被召的人來赴席，他們卻不肯來。

S.FORM: Ni-patou-la'n tyn madingi ta pani ki kouncia, ka ni-k'ma, vana-van-ei ta ni-æi tan-nin bana, K'yt-t'ei ni-t'anang-au ta i-danga-ranga-au-mau, ni-pogh ta louang-au ka ni-æhæp, ki ni-touftouf-appa [ka laulong] ka ni-si-ymmid si-kaha si-tan, nda ou-koua-au tou ouvava-toughan ki pakakyttil-an.

Ni-patou-la'n tyn madingi ta pani ki kouncia, ka ni-k'ma, vana-van-ei ta ni-æi tan-nin bana, K'yt-t'ei ni-t'anang-au ta i-danga-ranga-au-mau, ni-pogh ta louang-au ka ni-æhæp, ki ni-touftouf-appa [ka laulong] ka ni-si-ymmid si-kaha si-tan, nda ou-koua-au tou ouvava-toughan ki pakakyttil-an.
S.TRANS: Wederom sond hy andere dienltknechten uyt seggende seght den genoodden Siet ick hebbe mijn middaghmacl bereydt mijn olsen ende de gemellte [beesten] 3yn sijn geflachtet ende alle dingen 30n gereet komt tot de
Again, he sent forth other servants, saying, Tell them which are bidden, Behold, I have prepared my dinner: my oxen and my fatlings are killed, and all things are ready: come unto the marriage.
王又打發別的僕人，說：『你們告訴那被召的人，我的筵席已經預備好了，牛和肥畜已經宰了，各樣都齊備，請你們來赴席。』

S.FORM: Rå dou asli nein ni-illigh, ni-d'marang mou-koua teni k'atta tou ouma tyn, teni k'anna tou pa'i-ass-'an tyn.
Rå dou asli nein ni-illigh, ni-d'marang mou-koua teni k'atta tou ouma tyn, teni k'anna tou pa'i-ass-'an tyn.
S.TRANS: sy [alcx] niet ach tende zijn henen gegaen pese tot fijnen acke: gene tot ine koopmanschap.
But they made light of it, and went their ways, one to his farm, another to his merchandise:
那些人不理就走了；一個到自己田裏去；一個做買賣去；

S.FORM: Rå neni ka rarouma dou ni-tmouroung ki kouncia tyn, ni-smamuk pakapat-ei neini-æn.
Rå neni ka rarouma dou ni-tmouroung ki kouncia tyn, ni-smamuk pakapat-ei neini-æn.
S.TRANS: Ende de andere grepen tne dienanechten deden thaer macthept aen ende dooddense, . -
And the remnant took his servants, and entreated them spitefully, and slew them.
其餘的拿住僕人，凌辱他們，把他們殺了。

S.FORM: Irou ka millingigh [ki atta] ta Mej-sasou ka Si-bavau, ni-'ah-æg-nang-a-yddyngdyngyt ta te-ni, ka rou ni-pad-ading-i-en tyn ta kabatoung-an ki ta'u ka macyt, ni-sidada tyn ta tama-lpogh k'anna, ka na pa--idigh tyn ki apoei ta euma nein;

Irou ka millingigh [ki atta] ta Mej-sasou ka Si-bavau, ni-'ah-æg-nang-a-yddyngdyngyt ta te-ni, ka rou ni-pad-ading-i-en tyn ta kabatoung-an ki ta'u ka macyt, ni-sidada tyn ta tama-lpogh k'anna, ka na pa--idigh tyn ki apoei ta euma nein;
S.TRANS: Alsnude ùomng[dat] hoorde wiert hy toormigh ende (ne kryghs-hepren sendende heeft die dootsiagers berniek ende hare tadt m. bgannt geltcken.
But when the king heard thereof, he was wroth: and he sent forth his armies, and destroyed those murderers, and burned up their city.
王就大怒，發兵除滅那些兇手，燒毀他們的城。

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-koun tyn ki koun-cia tyn-nda, Peikahan-ato mei-ta-nan ta vatough ki pakakyttil-an, râ neni ka ni-i-tan-nin bana, assi mamsing irang ki kidi.
Anna ta ni-koun tyn ki koun-cia tyn-nda, Peikahan-ato mei-ta-nan ta vatough ki pakakyttil-an, râ neni ka ni-i-tan-nin bana, assi mamsing irang ki kidi.
S.TRANS: Dor sepde Hy tot ijne dienstknechten De bjuybddtc is wel bereydt doch DE gonoodde en waren het niet egy. :
Then saith he to his servants, The wedding is ready, but they which were bidden were not worthy.
於是對僕人說：『喜筵已經齊備，只是所召的人不配。

S.FORM: Alei ki anna u-pænæ'-u tou pta ki darang, ka papynna-pynna ki voual ka kabalei-au-moumi, tid-dau-auto pa-oukoua tou ou-vava-toug-eih ki pakakyttil-an.
Alei ki anna u-pænæ'-u tou pta ki darang, ka papynna-pynna ki voual ka kabalei-au-moumi, tid-dau-auto pa-oukoua tou ou-vava-toug-eih ki pakakyttil-an.
S.TRANS: Daerom gaer op de untgangen der wegen ende fo bele als gyder sult binden roeptle tot de bpuploft,
Go ye therefore into the highways, and as many as ye shall find, bid to the marriage.
所以你們要往岔路口上去，凡遇見的，都召來赴席。』

S.FORM: Karoutpapænælita koung-cia k'anna tou dara-darang, nipa-pakoilau ymmid ka ni-kabalei nein, ka mat'e ka matiang-appa, ka ni-matmoei ta vatough ki a ia-roung.
Karoutpapænælita koung-cia k'anna tou dara-darang, nipa-pakoilau ymmid ka ni-kabalei nein, ka mat'e ka matiang-appa, ka ni-matmoei ta vatough ki a ia-roung.
S.TRANS: Ende discibe dimnstknerhita apegaende op de wegt brjgaderden alle diesp bonden beyde xtade ci goede efi de buyyllofe wierde ber-
So those servants went out into the highways, and gathered together all as many as they found, both bad and good: and the wedding was furnished with guests.
那些僕人就出去，到大路上，凡遇見的，不論善惡都召聚了來，筵席上就坐滿了客。

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-mou-rbota Mei-sasou ka Si-bavau tou hi-matta-eih tyn ta aia-roung, ni-k'ytt'an tyn ta ta'u ka assi mahkoulamough tou ou-vavatough-an ki pakakyt til-an-da.
Irou ka ni-mou-rbota Mei-sasou ka Si-bavau tou hi-matta-eih tyn ta aia-roung, ni-k'ytt'an tyn ta ta'u ka assi mahkoulamough tou ou-vavatough-an ki pakakyt til-an-da.
S.TRANS: Ende als de koning ingegaen was om de aenlittende [ gasten] te obe sien' sach Hy aldaer een mensche niet gekleedt [zijnde] met een byylofcs kleedt.
And when the king came in to see the guests, he saw there a man which had not on a wedding garment:
王進來觀看賓客，見那裏有一個沒有穿禮服的，

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Diou, mamang ta ni-ou-rbo-en-hou hia rou assi-kow mah-koulamough ki ou-vavatouvatough? Ka ni-mak-digh ki marat ta teni.
Ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Diou, mamang ta ni-ou-rbo-en-hou hia rou assi-kow mah-koulamough ki ou-vavatouvatough? Ka ni-mak-digh ki marat ta teni.
S.TRANS: Ende seyde tot hem Diient hoe zijt ghy hier inghekomen gheen bruploftsleedt{aen] hebbendes Ende hy berstomde.
And he saith unto him, Friend, how camest thou in hither not having a wedding garment? And he was speechless.
就對他說：『朋友，你到這裏來怎麼不穿禮服呢？』那人無言可答。

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-k'ma ta Mei-sasou ka Si-bavau ki Pæäiroung-en tyn, Hali-rima-ei, hali-rahpal-ei, arau, 'aryngan-ei tyni-æn tou ka-rimdim-an ka siouro itou-tauagh: Tou hynna-al-ato ta tangi-tangi-en ki pat-ityng-en-appa ki waligh.

Anna ta ni-k'ma ta Mei-sasou ka Si-bavau ki Pæäiroung-en tyn, Hali-rima-ei, hali-rahpal-ei, arau, 'aryngan-ei tyni-æn tou ka-rimdim-an ka siouro itou-tauagh: Tou hynna-al-ato ta tangi-tangi-en ki pat-ityng-en-appa ki waligh.
S.TRANS: Doe sepde de Koning tot de dienaers Bindet lijne handen ende boeten neemt Hem wegh ende werpt [hem] upt in de buytenste duysternisse:Daer sal zijn weeninge ende knersinge der tanden,
Then said the king to the servants, Bind him hand and foot, and take him away, and cast him into outer darkness, there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
於是王對使喚的人說：『捆起他的手腳來，把他丟在外邊的黑暗裏；在那裏必要哀哭切齒了。』

S.FORM: Ka mabatoung ta ni-ta-tæäm, rå matiting ta ni-peri.
Ka mabatoung ta ni-ta-tæäm, rå matiting ta ni-peri.
S.TRANS: Want bele zijn geroepen | maer wepnighe uptberoren,
For many are called, but few are chosen.

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna ni-d'ma-rang ti sariséen ka ni-mattæ'i-sal ki sou, alei ka teih-douk-ah tih-kla ki patta'i-rouh-kin ki sou nein tyni-æn.
Tou kidi k'anna ni-d'ma-rang ti sariséen ka ni-mattæ'i-sal ki sou, alei ka teih-douk-ah tih-kla ki patta'i-rouh-kin ki sou nein tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Doe gingen de Pharifeen henen ende hielden t'samen raet hoe sy hem berKiicken souden in [foe re: en.
Then went the Pharisees, and took counsel how they might entangle him in his talk.
當時，法利賽人出去商議，怎樣就着耶穌的話陷害他，

S.FORM: Ka ni-padingi-en nein pa-ou-koua tyni-æn ta Pahtatæutau-ug-han.nein lam ki Herodianen, komma-koua, Tama-mahtæutau-ugh, kavana'nian ka matiktik kow ki sou, ka mahtautæuugh kow ki darang ki Alid tou katiktik-an, ka mang-au-'m hou ta tinamang ka ta'u: ka assi kow masa'u-kulkul ki vlung ki ta'u.

Ka ni-padingi-en nein pa-ou-koua tyni-æn ta Pahtatæutau-ug-han.nein lam ki Herodianen, komma-koua, Tama-mahtæutau-ugh, kavana'nian ka matiktik kow ki sou, ka mahtautæuugh kow ki darang ki Alid tou katiktik-an, ka mang-au-'m hou ta tinamang ka ta'u: ka assi kow masa'u-kulkul ki vlung ki ta'u.
S.TRANS: Ende sy sonden upt cot hem hare Discipelen met de Herodianen segghende Meelte wp weten dat ghy waerachtigh zijt ende den wegh Godes inde? waerhept leert ende na niemant en braegt: want ghy en siet den ptrsoon der menschen niet gen.

And they sent out unto him their disciples with the Herodians, saying, Master, we know that thou art true, and teachest the way of God in truth, neither carest thou for any man: for thou regardest not the person of men.
就打發他們的門徒同希律黨的人去見耶穌，說：「夫子，我們知道你是誠實人，並且誠誠實實傳上帝的道，甚麼人你都不徇情面，因為你不看人的外貌。

S.FORM: Anna ta vana-van'ei-kame, Mamang ta rýh-euho? hahei-en kaua piæ ki Mei-sasou ka Si-atigh Si-bavau ta 'äymhgan, assi lava ha-hei-en?
Anna ta vana-van'ei-kame, Mamang ta rýh-euho? hahei-en kaua piæ ki Mei-sasou ka Si-atigh Si-bavau ta 'äymhgan, assi lava ha-hei-en?
S.TRANS: Seght ons dan Wat dunckt u + is het geoorloft den Hepser fchattinge te geben ofte niet +
Tell us therefore, What thinkest thou? Is it lawful to give tribute unto Caesar, or not?
請告訴我們，你的意見如何？納稅給凱撒可以不可以？」

S.FORM: Râ tou kalang-in Jesus ta sasamk'en ki ryh nein, ni-k'ma neini-en,
Râ tou kalang-in Jesus ta sasamk'en ki ryh nein, ni-k'ma neini-en,
S.TRANS: hy + Sy seyden tot hem Dabids [fone.]
But Jesus perceived their wickedness, and said, Why tempt ye me, ye hypocrites?
耶穌看出他們的惡意，就說：「假冒為善的人哪，為甚麼試探我？

S.FORM: Ymoumi ka panni-nni-en ki rýh ki sou,ka mang ta rarpung-'noumi jau-an? Pa-k'ytta-au koh ta malyttok ka "äymhgan. Kani-ad-nein tyni-æn ta denarium [ka malyttok ka ni-patag-hen.]
Ymoumi ka panni-nni-en ki rýh ki sou,ka mang ta rarpung-'noumi jau-an? Pa-k'ytta-au koh ta malyttok ka "äymhgan. Kani-ad-nein tyni-æn ta denarium [ka malyttok ka ni-patag-hen.]
S.TRANS: Shy gebepnsde wat bessoeckt ghy my + Toont my den schattingpenning. Ende sy brachten hemer eenen penningh.
Shew me the tribute money. And they brought unto him a penny.
拿一個上稅的錢給我看！」他們就拿一個銀錢來給他。

S.FORM: Ka ni-kma neini-æn, Ah timang ta pa-souh-ta'u-ta'u-en k'at-ta? na 'hahalap-appa ka pa-tagh?
Ka ni-kma neini-æn, Ah timang ta pa-souh-ta'u-ta'u-en k'atta? na 'hahalap-appa ka pa-tagh?
S.TRANS: Ende hy feyde tot hay Miens is dit beelt ende het opschyift *
And he saith unto them, Whose is this image and superscription?
耶穌說：「這像和這號是誰的？」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma tyni-æn, A tou Si-atigh Si-bavau. Anna ta ni-k'ma neini-æn, P'hei-to ki Si-atigh Si-bavau ka atou Si-atigh Si-bavau,ki Alid-appa ka atou Alid-râ.
Ni-k'ma tyni-æn, A tou Si-atigh Si-bavau. Anna ta ni-k'ma neini-æn, P'hei-to ki Si-atigh Si-bavau ka atou Si-atigh Si-bavau,ki Alid-appa ka atou Alid-râ.
S.TRANS: Sp leyden rot hem Des Kepsers. Doe sepde hy tot harr Geefc dan den Keyfe; dat des iensers 1s ende Gode dat Godts.
They say unto him, Caesar's. Then saith he unto them, Render therefore unto Caesar the things which are Caesar's; and unto God the things that are God's.
他們說：「是凱撒的。」耶穌說：「這樣，凱撒的物當歸給凱撒；上帝的物當歸給上帝。」

S.FORM: Irou ka millingigh ta neni ki atta, ni-mouh-kiap-ato: ka rou pa-yhka-koua tyni-æn, ni-dma-rang ta neni.
Irou ka millingigh ta neni ki atta, ni-mouh-kiap-ato: ka rou pa-yhka-koua tyni-æn, ni-dma-rang ta neni.
S.TRANS: Endespdit hoorende berwonderden haer : ende hem berlatende 31jn \p wegh gegaen
When they had heard these words, they marvelled, and left him, and went their way.
他們聽見就希奇，離開他走了。 （可12‧18－27；路20‧27－40）

S.FORM: Tou wæi k'anna ierrou ato moukoua tyni-æn ta Saddu-ceen, ka k'ma-kouakoua hynna, ka aou-si-ah ta likough-eih achpit, ka ni-tmaligh tyni-æn,
Tou wæi k'anna ierrou ato moukoua tyni-æn ta Saddu-ceen, ka k'ma-kouakoua hynna, ka aou-si-ah ta likough-eih achpit, ka ni-tmaligh tyni-æn,
S.TRANS: © Te dien selben dage quamen tot hem de Sadduceen die seggen datter geen opstandinghe en 1s ende braeghden hem .
The same day came to him the Sadducees, which say that there is no resurrection, and asked him,
撒都該人常說沒有復活的事。那天，他們來問耶穌說：

S.FORM: K'ma, Tama-mahtæutau-ugh ni-k'ma ta ti Moses, Heirou mapatei ta timamang ka aöusi ki alalak, anna ta pou-tbung-ah ta tai-a-para tyn ki ni-keiäen tyn, ka pææhpit-ah ki æp ki tæi-a-para tyn.
K'ma, Tama-mahtæutau-ugh ni-k'ma ta ti Moses, Heirou mapatei ta timamang ka aöusi ki alalak, anna ta pou-tbung-ah ta tai-a-para tyn ki ni-keiäen tyn, ka pææhpit-ah ki æp ki tæi-a-para tyn.
S.TRANS: Seas gende Meester Moles h seght Jndien yemant stexft geen geen kinderen hebbende soo salsijnen border des selben wyf trouwen ende synen broetder raet berwecken,
Saying, Master, Moses said, If a man die, having no children, his brother shall marry his wife, and raise up seed unto his brother.
「夫子，摩西說：『人若死了，沒有孩子，他兄弟當娶他的妻，為哥哥生子立後。』

S.FORM: Nda na akou-papyttou ki mahtæiappapara ymian-æn, ka naunamou ka ni-pou-tbung ta ni-map-atei-ato, ka alei ka aousi ki alalak, ni-pa-tbli ki ni-keiæ tyn ki ta'i-apara tyn.
Nda na akou-papyttou ki mahtæiappapara ymian-æn, ka naunamou ka ni-pou-tbung ta ni-map-atei-ato, ka alei ka aousi ki alalak, ni-pa-tbli ki ni-keiæ tyn ki ta'i-apara tyn.
S.TRANS: Nu waren daer by ons seben broeders ende de eesste [een wif] getrouwt hebbehde tef ende dewijle hy geen raedt en hadde soo liet hy sijn wijf boor ijnen broeder.
Now there were with us seven brethren: and the first, when he had married a wife, deceased, and, having no issue, left his wife unto his brother:
從前，在我們這裏有弟兄七人，第一個娶了妻，死了，沒有孩子，撇下妻子給兄弟。

S.FORM: Ni-mahkaulaula k'omma-hynna ta ti kara-rouha, ta'ti kata tourou, mah-kidi-appa ki kapa-pyttou.
Ni-mahkaulaula k'omma-hynna ta ti kara-rouha, ta'ti kata tourou, mah-kidi-appa ki kapa-pyttou.
S.TRANS: Desgelijcks oock de tweede ende de derde tot den sebenden toe.
Likewise the second also, and the third, unto the seventh.
第二、第三，直到第七個，都是如此。

S.FORM: Tou 'äugh ki ymmid nei-ni-æn ni-pis-koua-appa mapatei ta jna.
Tou 'äugh ki ymmid nei-ni-æn ni-pis-koua-appa mapatei ta jna.
S.TRANS: Ten laetlten nae allen is oock de brouwe gheltor-
And last of all the woman died also.
末後，婦人也死了。

S.FORM: Anna ta tou likough-eih ahpit, a timang-ah ta keijen ki pa-pyttou k'anna? dou ni-pou-ymmid nein pou-tbung tyni-æn.
Anna ta tou likough-eih ahpit, a timang-ah ta keijen ki pa-pyttou k'anna? dou ni-pou-ymmid nein pou-tbung tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: In de opstandinghe dan wiens wyf sal sy wesen ban die seben $ want sy hebbense alle gehadt.
Therefore in the resurrection whose wife shall she be of the seven? for they all had her.
這樣，當復活的時候，她是七個人中哪一個的妻子呢？因為他們都娶過她。」

S.FORM: Râ ni-matte'i-vlli ta ti Je-sus, k'ma-hia neini-æn, Taura-heï-kamou tou assi kavan'an kina sasoulat ki ligh-appa ki Alid..
Râ ni-matte'i-vlli ta ti Je-sus, k'ma-hia neini-æn, Taura-heï-kamou tou assi kavan'an kina sasoulat ki ligh-appa ki Alid..
S.TRANS: ar: Jefus antwoordde ende sepde tot haer Ghy dwaelt niet weteii deSchutten noch de kracht Godts.
Jesus answered and said unto them, Ye do err, not knowing the scriptures, nor the power of God.
耶穌回答說：「你們錯了；因為不明白聖經，也不曉得上帝的大能。

S.FORM: Nda tou likough-eih achpit assi pou-tbung-ah, assi papou-tbung-an-eih-appa: râ mam'al-ato ki Tamahnau ki Alid tou tounoun ki vullum.
Nda tou likough-eih achpit assi pou-tbung-ah, assi papou-tbung-an-eih-appa: râ mam'al-ato ki Tamahnau ki Alid tou tounoun ki vullum.
S.TRANS: Want in de opftandinghe en nemen sy niet ten houwclicke noch en worden niet ten houwelick uptgegeben: maer sy zijn als Engelen Godts inden hemel.
For in the resurrection they neither marry, nor are given in marriage, but are as the angels of God in heaven.
當復活的時候，人也不娶也不嫁，乃像天上的使者一樣。

S.FORM: Ka atou likough-eih æhpit, assi-moumi kaua ni-kting ta ni-pasousou-en ki Alid ymoumi-æn, ka k'ma,
Ka atou likough-eih æhpit, assi-moumi kaua ni-kting ta ni-pasousou-en ki Alid ymoumi-æn, ka k'ma,
S.TRANS: Ende wat aengaet de opstandinghe der dooden en hebt gy niet gelesen her gene ban Godt tot u lieden ghesproken is die daer seght
But as touching the resurrection of the dead, have ye not read that which was spoken unto you by God, saying,
論到死人復活，上帝在經上向你們所說的，你們沒有念過嗎？

S.FORM: Ti jau ta Alid ti Abraham, ta Alid ti Isaak, ta Alid-appa ti Jakob? Alid ta assi Alid ki patei, râ ki mæuah.
Ti jau ta Alid ti Abraham, ta Alid ti Isaak, ta Alid-appa ti Jakob? Alid ta assi Alid ki patei, râ ki mæuah.
S.TRANS: Ick ben de Godt Abrahams ende de Godt Tlaacs efi de Godt Jacobs? Godt en is niet cen Godt der dooden marr der lebende.
I am the God of Abraham, and the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob? God is not the God of the dead, but of the living.
他說：『我是亞伯拉罕的上帝，以撒的上帝，雅各的上帝。』上帝不是死人的上帝，乃是活人的上帝。」

S.FORM: Irou ka millingigh[ki atta] ta makoilalaulau ni-mauhki-ap-ato ki na pahtatæutæuugh tyn.
Irou ka millingigh[ki atta] ta makoilalaulau ni-mauhki-ap-ato ki na pahtatæutæuugh tyn.
S.TRANS: Ende de charen [dir] hoorende wierden berslagen ober Cijne leere,
And when the multitude heard this, they were astonished at his doctrine.
眾人聽見這話，就希奇他的教訓。 （可12‧28－34；路10‧25－28）

S.FORM: Rå tou illing-hen ki sari séen ka ni tkid tyn ta moutos ki Sadduceen, ni-mæua-sal mæuakla ta neni.
Rå tou illing-hen ki sari séen ka ni tkid tyn ta moutos ki Sadduceen, ni-mæua-sal mæuakla ta neni.
S.TRANS: Ende dePhariseen gehoort hebbende dat hy den Sadduceen den mondt ghefiopt hadde 3hn te samen by een bergadert.
But when the Pharisees had heard that he had put the Sadducees to silence, they were gathered together.
法利賽人聽見耶穌堵住了撒都該人的口，他們就聚集。

S.FORM: Ka saat neini-æn-ka Mah-tæutæuugh ki Tatouhko ta ni-rih-pung tmaligh tyni-æn, k'ma,
Ka saat neini-æn-ka Mah-tæutæuugh ki Tatouhko ta ni-rih-pung tmaligh tyni-æn, k'ma,
S.TRANS: Ende een uyt hae? [zijnde] een Wet-geleerde heeft gebraeght hem bersoeckende ende seggende
Then one of them, which was a lawyer, asked him a question, tempting him, and saying,
內中有一個人是律法師，要試探耶穌，就問他說：

S.FORM: Tama-mahtæutæuugh,ka-mang ta sou ka pah-kousasousou ki keirang-en tou Tatouhko?
Tama-mahtæutæuugh,ka-mang ta sou ka pah-kousasousou ki keirang-en tou Tatouhko?
S.TRANS: Meelte welck is het geoot gebodt in de Wet $
Master, which is the great commandment in the law?
「夫子，律法上的誡命，哪一條是最大的呢？」

S.FORM: Rå ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ty-ni-an, Mava'ango-ah kow ki Mei-rang ka Alid oho tou tyntin-noho ka myhta tmouk, tou vatti-oho ka myhtatmouk, tou ymd-appa ki ou-mhga-en hou pah-dimdim.
Rå ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ty-ni-an, Mava'ango-ah kow ki Mei-rang ka Alid oho tou tyntin-noho ka myhta tmouk, tou vatti-oho ka myhtatmouk, tou ymd-appa ki ou-mhga-en hou pah-dimdim.
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus seyde tot hem Ghy sult liefhebben den Heere uwen Godt met geheel uw' herte ende met geheeluwe riele ende met gehcel uw' berstandt.
Jesus said unto him, Thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind.
耶穌對他說：「你要盡心、盡性、盡意愛主－你的上帝。

S.FORM: Atta ta sou ka pahkousasou-sou ka naunamou ki keirang-en.
Atta ta sou ka pahkousasou-sou ka naunamou ki keirang-en.
S.TRANS: Dit is het cerlte ende het groot gebodt.
This is the first and great commandment.
這是誡命中的第一，且是最大的。

S.FORM: Rå kararouha ta mahkau-laula ki atta: Mavæango-ah kow ki ta'u ka rarouma mama mama-do ymhou-an.
Rå kararouha ta mahkau-laula ki atta: Mavæango-ah kow ki ta'u ka rarouma mama mamado ymhou-an.
S.TRANS: Ende het tweede desen geliick [is:] Ghy sult uwen Naesten lief hebben als uselben.
And the second is like unto it, Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself.
其次也相倣，就是要愛人如己。

S.FORM: Tou rourouha ki pahkou-sasousou k'atta æul-in ta ymmid ki Tatouhko ki na Tama-mattai-
Tou rourouha ki pahkou-sasousou k'atta æul-in ta ymmid ki Tatouhko ki na Tama-mattai-
S.TRANS: Aen dese twee gheboden hanght de gantsche Wet ende de Propheten.
On these two commandments hang all the law and the prophets.
這兩條誡命是律法和先知一切道理的總綱。」 （可12‧35－37；路20‧41－44）

S.FORM: Irou ka makoi-sal-ato ta sariséen, ni-tmaligh neini-æn ta ti Jesus,
Irou ka makoi-sal-ato ta sariséen, ni-tmaligh neini-æn ta ti Jesus,
S.TRANS: Als nu de Phariseen t samen bergadert waren braeghde hae: Jclus
While the Pharisees were gathered together, Jesus asked them,
法利賽人聚集的時候，耶穌問他們說：

S.FORM: Ka kima, pa'mang-'noumi ta ti Christus? Alak ti mang ta te ni? Ni-k'ma ta neini tyni-æn, na Alak ti David.
Ka kima, pa'mang-'noumi ta ti Christus? Alak ti mang ta te ni? Ni-k'ma ta neini tyni-æn, na Alak ti David.
S.TRANS: Ende sepde Wat duncktu ban de Chailtus +
Saying, What think ye of Christ? whose son is he? They say unto him, The son of David.
「論到基督，你們的意見如何？他是誰的子孫呢？」他們回答說：「是大衛的子孫。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma neini-æn mamei-mang ka mananang tyni-æn ta.ti David ki Joepan, ki Meirang-tyn, dou k'ma,
Ni-k'ma neini-æn mamei-mang ka mananang tyni-æn ta.ti David ki Joepan, ki Meirang-tyn, dou k'ma,
S.TRANS: hy sepde tot haer Hoe noemt hem dan Dabid in den Geeft shnen Heere seggende
He saith unto them, How then doth David in spirit call him Lord, saying,
耶穌說：「這樣，大衛被聖靈感動，怎麼還稱他為主，說：

S.FORM: Ni-masousou ta Meirang ki Meirang-au, mieroung-a tou ouwal-au tou kidi ka pa-itou koua-aul-ato mau ta sivænæuvæu ugh ymhou-an tou kahkakou-an ki rahpal oho?
Ni-masousou ta Meirang ki Meirang-au, mieroung-a tou ouwal-au tou kidi ka pa-itou koua-aul-ato mau ta sivænæuvæu ugh ymhou-an tou kahkakou-an ki rahpal oho?
S.TRANS: Deheere heeft gelegt tot mynen Heere Sit aen mijne rechter-[handr, Jcot dat ick uwe byanden sal geset hebben tot een boetbanck uwer boeten
The LORD said unto my Lord, Sit thou on my right hand, till I make thine enemies thy footstool?
主對我主說：

S.FORM: Heirou mananang ta ti Da-vid tyni-æn, Meirang, mamei mang ka na Alak tyn ta [teni?]
Heirou mananang ta ti David tyni-æn, Meirang, mamei mang ka na Alak tyn ta [teni?]
S.TRANS: Indien hem dan Dabidnoemt [sijnen] Heere hoe is hy stjn Sone?
If David then call him Lord, how is he his son?
大衛既稱他為主，他怎麼又是大衛的子孫呢？」

S.FORM: Ka assi mattai-lpough ta timamang matte'i-vlli tyni-æn ki sasasat ki sou: ka ni-maneianei ta timamang siäugh ki kidi ki wa'i k'anna tmauki-lala tyni-æn. Kararouha kytti-æn'ab ki touro ki Ibah ki soulat.

Ka assi mattai-lpough ta timamang matte'i-vlli tyni-æn ki sasasat ki sou: ka ni-maneianei ta timamang siäugh ki kidi ki wa'i k'anna tmauki-lala tyni-æn. Kararouha kytti-æn'ab ki touro ki Ibah ki soulat.
S.TRANS: Ende niemandt en Konde hem een woordt antwoorden : noch niemant en durfde hem ban dien daghe gen [yet] meer braegen.
And no man was able to answer him a word, neither durst any man from that day forth ask him any more questions.
他們沒有一個人能回答一言。從那日以後，也沒有人敢再問他甚麼。
